---
title: "Western Regional Conference: IASP 2026"
date: "2026-03-20"
image: "images/academic_course.jpg"
path: "social/population_iasp_2026.pdf"
---

### Western Regional Conference of the Indian Association for the Study of Population (IASP)

**“Demographic Transition in Western India”**

Organized jointly with **Goa Business School, Goa University, Goa**

**Conference Dates:** March 20-21, 2026

#### 📅 Important Dates to Remember
| Event | Date |
|-------|------|
| Last Date for Online Abstract Submission | 15th February, 2026 |
| Intimation of acceptance | 17th February, 2026 |
| Registration | 18th February to 25th February 2026 |
| Full paper submission | 10th March, 2026 |

::: {.callout-important}
### Abstract Submission
[Submit your abstract here](https://forms.gle/dxgmZAGrdk5HdWVw5)
:::

[<i class="bi bi-file-pdf"></i> View Conference Broadsheet (PDF)](social/population_iasp_2026.pdf){.social-btn}
